title: ampelopsis sinica var. ciliata
intro: Ampelopsis sinica var. ciliata, also known as Chinese grapevine or Chinese ivy, is a type of woody vine native to China and Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Ampelopsis sinica var. ciliata include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and treating various digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as dried and processed into capsules or pills for consumption.
